features.title: Zero Config Setup
features.description: Stop wasting hours configuring Webpack, ESLint, or folder structures. Run one command and your dev environment is ready instantly.

features.title: Curated Templates
features.description: Choose from a selection of hand-crafted templates. From simple Native setups to modern API architectures.

features.title: Open Source
features.description: Transparent and free forever. View how templates are built, contribute your own, or customize it for your needs.

howItWorksSection.description: No global installation required. Use NPX to always fetch the latest version of our templates directly from the repository.

howItWorksSteps.title: Run the command
howItWorksSteps.description: Execute the CLI via NPX in your desired directory.

howItWorksSteps.title: Select a template
howItWorksSteps.description: Choose from the interactive prompt list.

howItWorksSteps.title: Start coding
howItWorksSteps.description: Your project is ready. Open it in your editor.
